body:
## Verdict

agent_supports: yes
irrlicht_observes: yes

## Reasoning

OpenCode ships a first-class `todowrite` tool for reading and writing todo-list items. The tool is invoked synchronously within the parent session's turn — it does not spawn child sessions or DB rows. Each call appears in the transcript as `{type: "tool", tool: "todowrite", state: {status: "completed", input: {todos: [...]}}}` and carries an authoritative snapshot of the whole list (OpenCode rewrites the entire list on every call).

What irrlicht observes: both the session state arc and the todo-list contents. The parent session transitions ready → working at the first `step-start`, stays working across the interleaved `step-finish reason=tool-calls` / `step-start` cycles (multi-step tool loop), and returns working → ready at the final `step-finish reason=stop`. Separately, the opencode parser folds each `todowrite` snapshot into `SessionMetrics.Tasks` (subject + status per item, reconciled against the latest snapshot), so each item and its status (`pending` / `in_progress` / `completed`) surface in the session API's `tasks` field. The replay golden now asserts on that field — the committed recording ends with the three items at `completed` / `in_progress` / `pending` respectively, exercising all three statuses.

SubagentCount stays 0 and no child sessions appear — a task list is internal to the agent's own session, distinct from the Agent/subagent primitives covered by `foreground-subagent` / `background-subagent`.
caveats: todowrite calls appear in the transcript with status=completed immediately — there is no pending/running intermediate state visible to the parser because OpenCode resolves the tool synchronously before appending the part.

Because OpenCode rewrites the whole list per call, the parser reconciles each snapshot against the running task list (pruning vanished items, honouring status reversions) rather than applying incremental deltas.

sources.note: appendTodowriteDeltas converts each todowrite snapshot into TaskCreate/TaskUpdate deltas plus a TaskSnapshot for reconciliation.
SessionMetrics.Tasks []Task — the API surface this scenario asserts on.
